name: Almighty Vice Lord Nation
description: The Almighty Vice Lord Nation (AVLN) is an African-American People Nation street gang and one of the largest gangs in the United States with 25,000+ members in chapters in every state. Founded in 1958 by Edwin Marion Perry, Toehold, Bobby Bonds, Ernest Wren, and Leonard Calloway at the Illinois State Training School for Boys in St. Charles. Headquartered in North Lawndale, Chicago. In the late 1960s, CVL Inc. became a non-profit that opened businesses and job training programs funded by government grants and the Rockefeller Foundation. The positive era collapsed when federal investigations shut them down in the early 1970s. Has 25+ factions including Conservative, Traveling, Renegade, Insane, Mafia, Imperial Insane, and Unknown Vice Lords — each operating independently. Symbols: Playboy Bunny, cane, top hat, martini glass, pyramid.

sources.title: Almighty Black P. Stone Nation — Wikipedia
